read_only_command.message: Cannot control {name}: the PLC has marked this widget as read-only.

not_changeable_command.message: Cannot change mode for {name}: the PLC has marked this mode as not changeable.

device_not_found.message: Device "{device}" not found. Verify the device name matches a configured TwinCAT IoT Communicator device.

acknowledge_message.name: Acknowledge message
acknowledge_message.description: Acknowledge a PLC push message on a TwinCAT IoT Communicator device.

device_name.name: Device name
device_name.description: Name of the PLC device (e.g. Usermode).

message_id.name: Message ID
message_id.description: ID of the message to acknowledge (e.g. 1). Leave empty to acknowledge all messages.

acknowledgement.name: Acknowledgement text
acknowledgement.description: Text sent back to the PLC as acknowledgement.

delete_message.name: Delete message
delete_message.description: Delete a PLC push message by clearing its retained MQTT topic.

device_name.name: Device name
device_name.description: Name of the PLC device (e.g. Usermode).

message_id.name: Message ID
message_id.description: ID of the message to delete (e.g. 1). Leave empty to delete all messages.

user.title: MQTT broker
user.description: Enter the connection details for your MQTT broker.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the MQTT broker (e.g. 192.168.1.100).
data_description.port: MQTT broker port (typically 1883, or 8883 for TLS).
data_description.use_tls: Encrypt the connection to the MQTT broker using TLS.

auth_method.title: Authentication
auth_method.description: Choose how to authenticate with the MQTT broker.

credentials.title: Broker credentials
credentials.description: Enter the username and password for your MQTT broker.

data_description.username: The username configured on the MQTT broker.
data_description.password: The password configured on the MQTT broker.

auth_url.title: OAuth / JWT login
auth_url.description: Enter the URL of your identity provider. The integration will automatically discover the authorization and token endpoints via OIDC.

data_description.auth_url: The base URL of your OAuth / OIDC provider.
data_description.client_id: The OAuth client ID registered at the identity provider (default: tc_iot_communicator).

obtain_token.title: Waiting for login
obtain_token.description: A browser window has opened for you to log in. This page will update automatically once authentication is complete.

topic.title: PLC topic
topic.description: Enter the MQTT main topic. Devices publishing on this topic are discovered automatically.

data_description.main_topic: The MQTT main topic configured in the TwinCAT IoT Communicator (e.g. IotApp.Sample).

reconfigure.title: Manage devices
reconfigure.description: Found {devices_found} device(s). Select which devices should be active in Home Assistant. Deselected devices will be removed.

data_description.selected_devices: Select the TwinCAT IoT Communicator devices you want to use.
data_description.create_areas: Create Home Assistant areas based on the view structure defined in the PLC and assign entities to them.

reauth_confirm.title: Session expired
reauth_confirm.description: The authentication token for your MQTT broker has expired or was rejected by the broker. Please log in again to restore the connection.

select_devices.title: Select devices
select_devices.description: Found {devices_found} device(s) on the broker. Select which devices to add to Home Assistant.

data_description.selected_devices: Select one or more TwinCAT IoT Communicator devices to integrate.
data_description.create_areas: Create Home Assistant areas based on the view structure defined in the PLC and assign entities to them.

error.connection_timeout: Connection timed out. Verify the broker address and port are correct and the broker is reachable.
error.hostname_not_found: Hostname could not be resolved. Check the broker address for typos.
error.tls_error: TLS/SSL handshake failed. Verify the certificate settings and whether TLS is required on this port.
error.already_configured: This broker and topic combination is already configured.
error.no_devices_found: No devices found. Verify the main topic and ensure the PLC is online and publishing.
error.no_devices_selected: Please select at least one device.
error.all_devices_configured: All discovered devices on this broker are already configured.

abort.all_devices_configured: All discovered devices on this broker are already configured.
abort.connection_timeout: Connection timed out. Verify the broker address and port are correct and the broker is reachable.
abort.hostname_not_found: Hostname could not be resolved. Check the broker address for typos.
abort.tls_error: TLS/SSL handshake failed. Verify the certificate settings and whether TLS is required on this port.
abort.token_request_timeout: Authentication timed out — no token was received from the login server.
abort.invalid_token: The received token could not be decoded. Please try again.
abort.token_expired: The received token has already expired. Please try again.
